title: App Settings - Navigation
scenario: Verify navigation within the Poly Studio Menu (App Settings) by accessing all tabs and returning to the main home screen.
steps: Tap the hamburger icon to open the menu.
Tap any tab to view its settings.
Tap the back icon to return to the main menu.
Swipe right from the left edge to go back.
Repeat for all available settings tabs.
expected: User can access every tab and return to the main home screen.
